entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 10
entries.excerpt: Then Moses numbers the generations descended from Noah: namely, fifteen generations from Japheth, counting him in; thirty generations from Ham, also counting him in, excluding the Philistines and Cappadocians, who came forth from them afterward; twenty-seven generations from Shem, counting him in. In all the generations were seventy-two. Each of them constituted its own people and language, and each dwelt in its own land.…
